content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – model for copy‑creation of Confidential Information
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_7_nda_17

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1 – Parties to the agreement
type Party = Company | AHPL

@ Clause 1.2(a) – Confidential Information (simplified)
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    source : Party,          # who disclosed the information (Discloser)
    content : string         # placeholder for the actual data
}

@ Clause 2.1(b) – Copy action performed by a party
type CopyAction = {
    info               : ConfidentialInfo,   # the information being copied
    made_by            : Party,              # party that creates the copy
    necessary_for_purpose : bool              # true iff the copy is reasonably necessary for the Purpose
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(b) – a concrete copy operation that may occur in a trace
entity copy_action : CopyAction

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.1(b) – Prohibition on copying unless it is reasonably necessary
rule F copying_not_reasonable:
    copy_action.made_by = Company and
    not copy_action.necessary_for_purpose always

@ Clause 2.1(b) – Permission to copy when it is reasonably necessary for the Purpose
rule P copying_allowed:
    copy_action.made_by = Company and
    copy_action.necessary_for_purpose always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper (optional) – a predicate that determines whether a copy is allowed
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_copy_permitted(action: CopyAction) -> bool:
    action.made_by = Company and action.necessary_for_purpose
```
